title: npm Publishing — Share What You Forge
author: forgemaster

content.theorem: A well-structured npm package with ESM/CJS dual export, TypeScript declarations, and tree-shaking support can reach any JS runtime
content.proof: package.json exports field maps ESM and CJS entry points. TypeScript generates .d.ts files automatically. Rollup/esbuild produces tree-shakeable bundles. The result: npm install @snapkit/core and use it in Node, Deno, Bun, or browser. One package, every runtime.
content.benchmark: Package size: 12KB minified, 4KB gzipped. Tree-shaken import of single function: 1.2KB. Full library: 12KB.
content.caveat: ESM/CJS dual support is a packaging nightmare. Use tsup or unbuild to automate. Never try to hand-roll package.json exports.
